Now, it looks like the next generation of Huawei Nova 16 series smartphones is on the way. Huawei is yet to confirm this officially, but ahead of it, a new leak has suggested that the new lineup will include Nova 16, Nova 16 Pro, and Nova 16 Pro Max varia...

articles.title: Upset Nvidia CEO Jensen Hunag to Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei: Get out of your ‘God complex’ and stop ...
articles.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang dismisses AI job loss predictions as 'ridiculous,' urging tech leaders to abandon their 'God complex.' He argues AI is a job creator, citing increased demand for software engineers and the Jevons paradox, where efficiency drives greater consumption and thus more jobs. Huang warns that discouraging technical careers could harm the US economy.

articles.title: Samsung Messages Is Going Away Soon. Check Out Our Top Alternatives
articles.description: Samsung Messages is saying goodbye in July. Samsung recommends Google Messages, but we have a few other suggestions for Galaxy owners, too.

articles.description: Savitt started his journey as a cab driver and later attended Columbia Law School.

articles.title: Apple's 2026 Pride Collection includes 11-color weaved Sport Band
articles.description: The 2026 Apple Pride Collection has arrived, with a new Apple Watch Pride Edition Sport Loop accompanied by a matching watch face and Pride Luminance wallpapers. Apple Watch Pride Edition Sport Loop for 2026 - Image Credit: Apple Each year, Apple releases Pride Editions of Apple Watch bands, as part of its work to champion LGBTQ+ equality. On May 4, the 2026 batch became available. The new Pride Edition Sport Loop is woven from nylon yarns in 11 colors. The weaving blends the colors into each other, which Apple describes as reflecting the "unique identities that shape LGBTQ+ communities worldwide." Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: IB Security Assistant final result 2026 released at mha.gov.in: Direct link to download list of shortlisted candidates
articles.description: The Intelligence Bureau has announced the final results for the Security Assistant/Motor Transport exam 2025 today, May 4, 2026. Candidates can find their names on the official MHA website. The selection is based on Tier-I and Tier-II performance, including a driving test and interview. Provisionally selected candidates need to complete pending document submissions.

articles.title: Falcon 9 Launches 45 Satellites in Major Global Rideshare Mission
articles.description: Falcon 9 launched 45 satellites, including South Korea’s CAS500-2 Earth observation mission. The rideshare highlights global collaboration, delayed launches due to geopolitics, and the growing demand for high-resolution imaging and commercial satellite deployment.

articles.description: BYD Atto 3 is the only model in this group not manufactured locally. It is assembled in India from completely knocked down (CKD) kits, which contributes to its higher price. It gets a 60.5 kWh battery pack paired with a front-axle-mounted electric motor which puts out 201hp of power and 310Nm of torque. It has a claimed range of 521 km.

articles.description: Tata Curvv EV SeriesX launched with two variants, 502 km range, 55 kWh battery and lifetime warranty, offering feature-based trims and real-world range of around 400 km.

articles.title: Singapore Airlines to launch high-speed Starlink Wi-Fi from 2027
articles.description: Singapore Airlines will introduce Starlink's high-speed in-flight Wi-Fi starting Q1 2027. The new service will be progressively rolled out across its Airbus A350-900 and A380 fleets, promising faster and more reliable connectivity.

articles.title: SEBI to issue advisory on vulnerabilities, urges proactive cyber defence
articles.description: SEBI Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey said an advisory on cyber threats like 'Mythos' is coming soon. He urged proactive mitigation, discussed guardrails for private credit and AIFs, and confirmed the CKYC 2.0 launch by July.

articles.description: Astrology suggests some intense relationships are fated, driven by planetary positions at birth and zodiac compatibility. These connections, marked by immediate recognition, intuitive communication, and high emotional impact, often lead to self-transformation and personal growth. Such profound bonds are not coincidental but cosmic encounters designed for lasting change and insight.

articles.title: Using WhatsApp? Meta Flags Security Risks And Urges Users To Update
articles.description: Meta has identified and resolved two security vulnerabilities in WhatsApp, affecting users on Windows, Android, and iOS. Both vulnerabilities were classified as medium severity and were not reported to have been exploited.

articles.description: POCO X8 Pro Max targets performance enthusiasts with its potent chipset and substantial battery, offering flagship-like speed at a mid-range price. While excelling in gaming and heavy tasks with effective cooling, its camera and software experience present trade-offs.

articles.description: There are currently no details on which engine the Honda ZR-V will be offered with in India. It’s expected to get a 2.0-litre, 4-cylinder, NA petrol engine paired with an e-motor. It puts out 180 hp & 240 nm torque. In terms of size, the Honda ZR-V measures about 4,568 mm in length, 1,840 mm in width and 1,620 mm in height, with a wheelbase of around 2,655-2,657 mm.

articles.description: WhatsApp is discontinuing avatars, removing creation, editing and profile support. The phased rollout also takes avatar tools out of settings, chats and the keyboard, while saved stickers remain available.

articles.title: Skyroot Vikram-1 rocket is raring to soar high
articles.description: Skyroot Aerospace is on the cusp of launching India's first privately built orbital rocket, Vikram-1, from Sriharikota within weeks. This crucial test flight aims to gather data for future commercial missions, carrying diverse payloads. Leveraging ISRO's infrastructure, a successful launch will position Skyroot as a key player in India's burgeoning private space sector, attracting global satellite operators.

articles.title: D2C brands tweak packaging as West Asia conflict pushes up costs
articles.description: Input cost hikes, fueled by the West Asia conflict, are forcing direct-to-consumer brands to adapt. Companies are shifting packaging, introducing larger or higher-priced variants, and accelerating supply chain localization to manage surging costs and protect margins. This strategic reevaluation impacts pricing and product offerings across various consumer segments.

articles.title: Tata Electronics aims to be $30 billion business with fab play: CEO & MD Randhir Thakur
articles.description: Tata Electronics is rapidly expanding its semiconductor and electronics manufacturing operations. The company has achieved significant revenue growth and is now profitable. With ambitious plans, it aims to become a $30 billion business in the next five years. Tata Electronics is building India's first semiconductor fab and an assembly and test unit, securing global customers and partners.

articles.title: EVs moving at faster speed in premium lane
articles.description: India's electric car market is seeing growth in premium segments. Carmakers are launching more expensive models, with sales in the ₹20-30 lakh bracket rising significantly. The share of cars below ₹10 lakh has decreased. Luxury EV demand is also strong. This trend suggests the market is expanding upwards, potentially limiting mass adoption.

articles.title: IT's revenue per employee up in productivity win
articles.description: India's leading IT firms are seeing revenue per employee rise. This indicates a shift towards AI and automation driving productivity. Companies like Tata Consultancy Services, Infosys, HCLTech, and Tech Mahindra reported growth. This trend suggests a move away from headcount-based revenue models. The industry is adapting to a new era of efficiency and value creation.
